task_completion.description: Navigate to the JFrog Artifactory instance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displaying the JFrog Artifactory login screen or home page at the URL http://localhost:8082.

task_completion.description: Log in to Artifactory using the admin account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory dashboard is visible, and the user profile menu or indicator (usually in the top right corner) shows that the 'admin' user is currently logged in.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the user profile or security settings to change the password.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the 'Edit Profile' page for the admin user or the Administration -> Security -> Users page, specifically showing the password change section.

task_completion.description: Enter the old and new passwords into the change password form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The password change form is visible with obscured text (dots/asterisks) entered into the 'Current Password', 'New Password', and 'Confirm Password' (or similar) input fields.
The 'Save', 'Update', or 'Change Password' button is clicked, and a success notification (e.g., a toast message saying 'User updated successfully' or 'Profile updated') is visible on the screen.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Artifactory rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: A graphical web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) is used to navigate the Artifactory UI. There should be no terminal windows showing 'curl' or API commands used to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine JFrog Artifactory application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the distinct JFrog Artifactory interface, not a text editor, mock webpage, or notes application.

integrity.description: The agent typed the password into the proper obscured fields rather than writing it out in plaintext elsewhere.
integrity.visual_evidence: The new password 'SecureAdmin2024!' is typed into standard password fields (where it appears as dots/asterisks) rather than being pasted into a visible text editor or search bar as a shortcut.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The JFrog Artifactory instance is located at http://localhost:8082. The target user account is 'admin'. The old password is 'password' and the new password to be set is 'SecureAdmin2024!'.
